You know, this was great value that you presented to me today, but this is not the right time. I'm not going to be able to make the investment. Not the right time. Imagine if the man who painted Mona Lisa said that it wasn't the right time to paint her. Imagine if your wife or your husband, when meeting you, said that it wasn't the right time for them. You would have those beautiful kids that I see you have here on your desk today, or up on your Facebook page. I'm looking at. Imagine if you and I, in this exact moment, chose for it to not be the right time. And imagine your business for what could have happened and what's never going to happen. What we'll never know will happen because it wasn't the right time. I encourage you, time is a mere measurement for us to determine when we need to do what. Your business needs this right now as we've both seen in the presentation we've done together today. I encourage you, let's get this agreement signed and start taking action. When can we do the strategy session tomorrow? So, always the right time. It's not the right time. I'm just not going to be able to take the action today. I think we're going to need to do it in about a month or so. Well, let me ask you a question. In about a month or so, are we going to circle back and have the same conversation and have to recalibrate? Or do you think it's going to be the same exact scenario that it is now for us to take action? Well, I don't understand what you mean. Well, let me to explain. See, in 30 days, I'll probably have about four to five more clients that we bring on. And those four to five clients might fill up all of our spots for how many people we choose to hold and represent in business at one time. And if I do decide to take you on in 30 days, I'm not going to be able to honor the same price that I'm trying to get you in and grant for you at now. I would love and encourage if the deal's right and if everything's fair, and this is your real objection for it not being the right time, to heavily consider at least the opportunity to lock in this price now, sign the agreement, and then maybe we wait a week or so and pick up the 30 days from there. Let's get the transaction out of the way and sign this agreement, and we'll talk about when the time is right for you to get everything else started.
